message: Fix declaration emit in `--moduleResolution bundler` using wrong exports conditions (#56265)
fix(53933): Confusing rules around function parameter names in a type (#53946)
Provide contextual `this` to functions assigned using compound assignments (#56116)

message: Remove old references to deprecated assertion node types (#56073)
Fixed declaration emit of object literals withs divergent accessors (#55442)
Make unchangedTextChangeRange const (#55836)
Fixed declaration emit for expando properties on function declarations declared using element access expressions (#55183)
Don't debug assert on broken link in moduleNameResolver (#55649)
Ensure parsing context is restored in jsdoc parser (#55537)
perf: replace String and Array indexOf method calls with includes method call (#55482)
Don't parse `DotDotDotToken` in JSX attribute values (#55284)
Fixed a redundant used before defined error (#55283)
Fixed serialization of param names in setters from JS files (#55393)
Fix typo isInvalid -> isValid (#55414)
Widen widening literal types through compound-like assignments (#52493)
Display write type for property accesses in write locations (#54777)
Discriminate contextual types using shorthand properties (#55151)
Prevent detached diagnostics from running off the end of the file (#55381)
Fixed `hasInvalidEscape` implementation (#55373)
Enable eslint rules prefer-rest-params and prefer-spread (#55181)
Disallow numeric literals with negative numbers (#55268)
Decorators normative updates (#55276)
Improve performance of maybe stack in recursiveTypeRelatedTo (#55224)
Do not offer completions for default module member symbol (#55231)
Wrap inline negative const enum with parens (#55065)
Do not include undefined in indexed access on tuple types within range of total fixed elements (#54558)

Consider `import.meta` a qualified name/property access (#54997)

scanNumber: smaller return value + side effects (#54534)
Emit `@overload` comments on generated overloads in.d.ts (#54846)
Eliminate addJSDocComment in favor of consistently using withJSDoc (#54802)

message: Consistently return `errorType` for super expressions in classes that extend `null` (#55506)
Fixed JSDoc get-only accessors to be serialized as `const` (#55444)

message: Offer auto-imports from wildcard exports with AutoImportProvider (#54831)
Fix narrowing of destructured tuples with different arities (#55744)
Share redirects cache key calculation between multiple caches used for module resolution and type reference directive (#55376)
chore: disallows unicode escape sequence in JSX (#48609)
Support resolution-mode overrides in type-only constructs in all moduleResolution modes (#55725)
Error on excessive relation complexity (#55851)
Merge remote-tracking branch 'origin/main' into release-5.3
Allow of in `await using` declarations in for-of loops (#55558)
fix(55796): JSDoc does not support @this when using an arrow function as method in class (#55877)
Picking resolutions of module for sourceFile as method (#55818)
Disallow object prototype property access on const enums (#55424)
Avoid trying to emit anonymous classish/expando functions as assignments (#55472)
Fixed a regression in serializing setters with non-function declarations in JS files (#55492)
fix(54760): Report error for 'declare type' followed by newline (#54761)
Fix fallthrough and default in new switch-true narrowing (#55991)

message: Updated typescript-eslint to v6 (#54693)
Fix file matching with tsx and dts of same name are included by include patterns (#55690)
Incremental testing for program structure and resolutions and fixes (#55814)
🐛 Fix not emitting comments between sibling fields of object literals (#50097)
ParseConfigHost needs to extend ModuleResolutionHost (#54922)
Improve error message for index signature on generic type when writing (#55906)
Transfer all declared symbols onto the type from the interface that extends another (#55252)
Avoid resolving objects in getTypeFacts when caller doesn't need that info (#55459)
pass program update level to getExternalFiles in tsserver plugins so plugins can make decision about their cache based on that (#56047)
Fix issue with wildcard with supported extensions when plugins add external files and override getScriptKind to add script kinds for the additional extensions (#55716)
Clean up helpers which are always present in ES2020 (#55515)
fix use-before-init error when targeting ES2022 (#55028)
Interactable parameter inlay hints (#54734)
Fixed parenthesized array literal expressions spread in calls not being tupleized (#54623)
Improve error for unclosed imports and exports (#54634)
Make JSDoc skipping public, plus more configurable (#55739)
